---
title: Descriptive Analysis of f75 Milk Formula
author: Group 
output: html_document
---

```{r, here-i-am, include = FALSE}
here::i_am(
  "report_midterm.Rmd"
)
```

Characteristics of the cohort are displayed below.
```{r, load-table-one, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
table_one <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/table_one.rds")
)

table_one
```


Boxplot that shows changes in MUAC from baseline to endlines across arms.
```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
boxplot <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/boxplot.rds")
)
boxplot
```

Linear regression model that predicts change in MUAC by arm.
```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
regression_table <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/regression_table.rds")
)

regression_table

```
